assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response does not mention upgrading the GKE control plane first, which is a prerequisite before upgrading node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Response clearly specifies coordinating→data→master upgrade order with rationale that coordinating nodes are stateless and safest to start with

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Regional pd-ssd volumes will reattach automatically' in the Key Safety Measures section

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention setting up PodDisruptionBudgets (PDB) for master nodes to ensure quorum maintenance

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Response shows maxUnavailable=1 for data nodes and varies settings across node pools, not consistently maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes continuous health monitoring commands and specifically mentions waiting for green status in post-upgrade recovery

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: The response does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain as a safety measure

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: While the response includes many kubectl commands, it does not specifically include commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Response includes explicit commands for creating Elasticsearch snapshots in the pre-upgrade preparation section
